title: v0.10.0
summaryZh: 新增 Confluence Publisher 插件：在内置 Monaco 编辑器中编辑本地 Markdown 文件，实时渲染类 Confluence 预览，并一键发布/更新到 Confluence Server / Data Center 页面。
summaryEn: New Confluence Publisher plugin: edit local Markdown files in a built-in Monaco editor, render a live Confluence-style preview, and publish/update pages on Confluence Server / Data Center with one click.

title: v0.9.3
summaryZh: CI 和 tag 触发发布中分别产出 Intel (x64) 与 Apple Silicon (arm64) 两套 macOS DMG。
summaryEn: Publishes separate macOS DMG assets for Intel (x64) and Apple Silicon (arm64) in CI and tag-triggered releases.

title: v0.9.2
summaryZh: 将 LAN Chat v0.9.0 与 v0.9.1 发布线合并为一个 v0.9.2 发布说明。
summaryEn: Consolidates the LAN Chat v0.9.0 and v0.9.1 release line into a single v0.9.2 release note.

title: v0.8.0
summaryZh: 新增统一 MQ Client 插件，支持 RabbitMQ 和 Kafka。
summaryEn: Added the unified MQ Client plugin for RabbitMQ and Kafka.

title: v0.7.1
summaryZh: 基于 issue #1 反馈优化 SSH terminal 工作区。
summaryEn: Improved the SSH terminal workspace based on issue #1 feedback.

title: v0.7.0
summaryZh: 新增首版 API Debugger 插件，在 DevNexus 内提供轻量 Postman-like HTTP/API 工作区。
summaryEn: Added the first API Debugger plugin, a lightweight Postman-like HTTP/API workspace inside DevNexus.

title: v0.6.0
summaryZh: 新增 Network 诊断插件，用于一次性连接排障。
summaryEn: Added the Network diagnostics plugin for one-shot connectivity troubleshooting.

title: v0.5.0
summaryZh: 新增 MySQL 客户端插件。

title: v0.4.0
summaryZh: 新增 MongoDB 客户端插件。

title: v0.3.0
summaryZh: S3 Client 从基础浏览升级为可用的对象管理工具。
summaryEn: Upgraded S3 Client from basic browsing to a practical object-management tool.

title: v0.2.0
summaryZh: Redis Key Browser 交互升级：Key Tree 和 Key Detail 支持可拖拽分栏。
summaryEn: Improved the Redis Key Browser interaction: Key Tree and Key Detail now support a draggable split boundary.
